mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Log(equipment_id, log_date, state) VALUES(#{equipmentId}, #{logDate}, #{state})
mapper.select: SELECT l.equipment_id, l.log_date, l.state, e.ename FROM Log l LEFT JOIN equipment e ON l.equipment_id = e.id ORDER BY l.log_date DESC, l.equipment_id
SELECT l.equipment_id, l.log_date, l.state, e.ename FROM Log l LEFT JOIN equipment e ON l.equipment_id = e.id WHERE l.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} ORDER BY l.log_date DESC
